CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(ReceiptNum__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Accession_Number__c)), OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Institutes", RecordType.DeveloperName = "Experts" ), Medical_Procedure__r.Are_services_private__c = TRUE, ISPICKVAL(Appointment_Status__c, 'Canceled'), ISPICKVAL(PaymentStatus__c, 'Valid'), OR( ISPICKVAL(Canceled_Reason__c, '59'), ISPICKVAL(Canceled_Reason__c, '60') ) ), IF( OR( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c = '11', PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c = '1112' ), "🟢 זיכוי מלא", IF( (Appointment_Date_Time__c - Cancellation_date_time__c) * 24 >= 24, "🟢 זיכוי מלא", IF( (Appointment_Date_Time__c - Cancellation_date_time__c) * 24 >= 12, "🟡 זיכוי 50%", IF( (Appointment_Date_Time__c - Cancellation_date_time__c) * 24 >= 4, "🔴 לא זכאי", "🔴 לא זכאי" ) ) ) ), "" )
CustomField.label: Refund Eligibility
